name: 4.7-rc2
body:
**Godot 4.7 RC 2** is a release candidate for the 4.7 feature release. Release candidates focus on finalizing the release and fixing remaining critical bugs.

Report bugs on GitHub after checking that they haven't been reported:
- https://github.com/godotengine/godot/issues

Built from commit [3df26a02c446710c979daa541b74f87edeca81b0](https://github.com/godotengine/godot/commit/3df26a02c446710c979daa541b74f87edeca81b0).
To make a custom build which would also be recognized as rc2, you should define `GODOT_VERSION_STATUS=rc2` in your build environment prior to compiling.

----

- [Release notes](https://godotengine.org/article/release-candidate-godot-4-7-rc-2/)
- [Complete changelog](https://godotengine.github.io/godot-interactive-changelog/#4.7-rc2)

----

- **Download (GitHub):** Expand **Assets** below

name: 4.7-beta5
body:
**Godot 4.7 beta 5** is a beta snapshot for the 4.7 feature release. Beta snapshots are feature-complete and provided for public beta testing to catch as many bugs as possible ahead of the stable release.

Report bugs on GitHub after checking that they haven't been reported:
- https://github.com/godotengine/godot/issues

Built from commit [bbd3f43b57db5008539e87bd86ef9e3cc7a44a23](https://github.com/godotengine/godot/commit/bbd3f43b57db5008539e87bd86ef9e3cc7a44a23).
To make a custom build which would also be recognized as beta5, you should define `GODOT_VERSION_STATUS=beta5` in your build environment prior to compiling.

----

- [Release notes](https://godotengine.org/article/dev-snapshot-godot-4-7-beta-5/)
- [Complete changelog](https://godotengine.github.io/godot-interactive-changelog/#4.7-beta5)

----

- **Download (GitHub):** Expand **Assets** below

name: 4.6.3-stable
body:
**Godot 4.6.3** is a maintenance release addressing stability and usability issues, and fixing all sorts of bugs. Maintenance releases are compatible with previous releases and are recommended for adoption.

Report bugs on GitHub after checking that they haven't been reported:
- https://github.com/godotengine/godot/issues

----

- [Release notes](https://godotengine.org/article/maintenance-release-godot-4-6-3/)

- [Curated changelog](https://github.com/godotengine/godot/blob/4.6.3-stable/CHANGELOG.md)

name: 4.7-dev5
body:
**Godot 4.7 dev 5** is a dev snapshot for the 4.7 feature release. Dev snapshots are in-development builds of the engine provided for early testing and feature evaluation while the engine is still being worked on.

Report bugs on GitHub after checking that they haven't been reported:
- https://github.com/godotengine/godot/issues

name: 4.6-dev5
body:
**Godot 4.6 dev 5** is a dev snapshot for the 4.6 feature release. Dev snapshots are in-development builds of the engine provided for early testing and feature evaluation while the engine is still being worked on.

Report bugs on GitHub after checking that they haven't been reported:
- https://github.com/godotengine/godot/issues

Built from commit [f5918a9d35350bf6402dd1b4902ab539747d77a6](https://github.com/godotengine/godot/commit/f5918a9d35350bf6402dd1b4902ab539747d77a6).
To make a custom build which would also be recognized as dev5, you should define `GODOT_VERSION_STATUS=dev5` in your build environment prior to compiling.

----

- [Release notes](https://godotengine.org/article/dev-snapshot-godot-4-6-dev-5/)
- [Complete changelog](https://godotengine.github.io/godot-interactive-changelog/#4.6-dev5)

----

- **Download (GitHub):** Expand **Assets** below
